auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Beamer API key sent in the Beamer-Api-Key header. Find or manage it in Settings > API after signing in: https://app.getbeamer.com/settings.

actions.name: count_unread_posts
actions.description: Count unread Beamer posts for one end-user context.

userId.description: The end-user identifier used together with filterByUserId.

filterByUserId.description: Whether to include single-user posts that match the provided userId.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for counting unread posts for one Beamer end-user context.

outputSchema.description: The unread post count returned by Beamer.

actions.name: create_post
actions.description: Create a new Beamer changelog post with one or more translations.

title.description: The translated post titles in Beamer order.

content.description: The translated post content values in the same order as the titles.

category.description: The category to assign to the new post.

publish.description: Whether to publish the post immediately.

archive.description: Whether the post should start archived.

pinned.description: Whether the post should be pinned to the top of the feed.

showInWidget.description: Whether the post should appear in the embedded widget.

showInStandalone.description: Whether the post should appear in the standalone feed.

boostedAnnouncement.description: The boosted announcement treatment to apply to the post.

linkUrl.description: The translated CTA URLs in Beamer order.

linkText.description: The translated CTA labels in Beamer order.

linksInNewWindow.description: Whether links should open in a new tab or window.

date.description: An ISO-8601 date-time string accepted by the Beamer API.

dueDate.description: An ISO-8601 date-time string accepted by the Beamer API.

items.description: A two-letter ISO-639 language code used by Beamer for localized content.

language.description: The translated language codes in Beamer order.

filter.description: The segmentation filter string for this post.

filterUserId.description: The single-user filter identifier or semicolon-separated identifiers for this post.

filterUrl.description: The URL targeting filter string for this post.

enableFeedback.description: Whether feedback should be enabled for the post.

enableReactions.description: Whether reactions should be enabled for the post.

enableSocialShare.description: Whether social sharing should be enabled for the post.

autoOpen.description: Whether the Beamer sidebar should auto-open for recipients.

sendPushNotification.description: Whether a web push notification should be sent for the post.

userEmail.description: The email of the Beamer account user creating this post.

fixedBoostedAnnouncement.description: Whether a boosted top-bar announcement should stay fixed on screen.

inputSchema.description: The JSON body for creating one Beamer changelog post.

date.description: The post publication date in ISO-8601 format.

dueDate.description: The post expiration date in ISO-8601 format.

showInWidget.description: Whether the post appears in the embedded widget.

showInStandalone.description: Whether the post appears in the standalone feed.

boostedAnnouncement.description: The boosted announcement treatment applied to the post.

content.description: The translated post content in plain text.

contentHtml.description: The translated post content in HTML format.

language.description: The language code for this translation.

category.description: The translated category label when one exists.

linkUrl.description: The CTA URL for this translation when one exists.

linkText.description: The CTA label for this translation when one exists.

images.description: The image URLs embedded in this translation.

items.description: One translated content variant returned by the Beamer API.

translations.description: The translated content blocks available for this post.

filter.description: The segmentation filter string applied to the post.

filterUrl.description: The URL targeting filter applied to the post.

autoOpen.description: Whether the post auto-opens the sidebar for recipients.

editionDate.description: The last edition date in ISO-8601 format.

feedbackEnabled.description: Whether feedback is enabled for the post.

reactionsEnabled.description: Whether reactions are enabled for the post.

views.description: The total view count for the post.

uniqueViews.description: The unique view count for the post.

clicks.description: The tracked click count for the post.

feedbacks.description: The feedback count for the post.

positiveReactions.description: The positive reaction count for the post.

neutralReactions.description: The neutral reaction count for the post.

negativeReactions.description: The negative reaction count for the post.

post.description: One Beamer changelog post returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The Beamer post created by the connector.

actions.name: get_feed_url
actions.description: Retrieve the standalone Beamer feed URL with optional language and segmentation filters.

language.description: A two-letter ISO-639 language code used by Beamer for feed localization.

filterByUrl.description: Whether URL segmentation should be applied to the feed URL.

filter.description: An optional segmentation filter string to apply.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for retrieving the standalone Beamer feed URL.

outputSchema.description: The standalone feed URL returned by Beamer.

actions.name: list_posts
actions.description: List existing Beamer posts with optional changelog, audience, and analytics filters.

filter.description: Retrieve posts with a matching segmentation filter.

forceFilter.description: Only retrieve posts that match this segmentation filter.

filterUrl.description: Retrieve posts with a matching segmentation URL.

dateFrom.description: An ISO-8601 date-time string accepted by the Beamer API.

dateTo.description: An ISO-8601 date-time string accepted by the Beamer API.

language.description: A two-letter ISO-639 language code used by Beamer for localized content.

category.description: Retrieve posts for a specific category.

published.description: Whether to retrieve only published or only draft posts.

archived.description: Whether to retrieve only archived or only non-archived posts.

expired.description: Whether to retrieve only expired or only non-expired posts.

filterByUserId.description: Whether to include single-user posts that match the provided userId.

userFirstName.description: The end user's first name used for analytics attribution.

userLastName.description: The end user's last name used for analytics attribution.

userEmail.description: The end user's email used for analytics attribution.

userId.description: The end-user identifier used for analytics attribution.

traceableLinks.description: Whether Beamer should rewrite links into tracked URLs.

ignoreRequestDetails.description: Whether backend request IP, browser, OS, and geolocation details should be ignored.

saveViews.description: Whether fetching these posts should save views in Beamer analytics.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of posts to return.

ignoreFilters.description: Whether Beamer should ignore segmentation filters when returning posts.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing existing posts from the Beamer API.

date.description: The post publication date in ISO-8601 format.

dueDate.description: The post expiration date in ISO-8601 format.

showInWidget.description: Whether the post appears in the embedded widget.

showInStandalone.description: Whether the post appears in the standalone feed.

boostedAnnouncement.description: The boosted announcement treatment applied to the post.

content.description: The translated post content in plain text.

contentHtml.description: The translated post content in HTML format.

language.description: The language code for this translation.

category.description: The translated category label when one exists.

linkUrl.description: The CTA URL for this translation when one exists.

linkText.description: The CTA label for this translation when one exists.

images.description: The image URLs embedded in this translation.

items.description: One translated content variant returned by the Beamer API.

translations.description: The translated content blocks available for this post.

filter.description: The segmentation filter string applied to the post.

filterUrl.description: The URL targeting filter applied to the post.

autoOpen.description: Whether the post auto-opens the sidebar for recipients.

editionDate.description: The last edition date in ISO-8601 format.

feedbackEnabled.description: Whether feedback is enabled for the post.

reactionsEnabled.description: Whether reactions are enabled for the post.

views.description: The total view count for the post.

uniqueViews.description: The unique view count for the post.

clicks.description: The tracked click count for the post.

feedbacks.description: The feedback count for the post.

positiveReactions.description: The positive reaction count for the post.

neutralReactions.description: The neutral reaction count for the post.

negativeReactions.description: The negative reaction count for the post.

items.description: One Beamer changelog post returned by the API.

posts.description: The Beamer posts that matched the request.

outputSchema.description: The Beamer posts returned by the connector.
